query:
SELECT urc.userId, u.name, urc.role, urc.cities 
FROM user_role_cities urc
INNER JOIN users u ON urc.userId = u.id
WHERE urc.role = 'teacher'
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute SELECT urc.userId, u.name, urc.role, urc.cities 
FROM user_role_cities urc
INNER JOIN users u ON urc.userId = u.id
WHERE urc.role = 'teacher'
LIMIT 10;
